ocr.text: In evaluating our retail strategy across the European market, a comprehensive analysis of inventory turnover by category, store
footprint optimization, and customer loyalty program metrics is crucial.

The data presented in Table 1 highlights significant insights, particularly within the Fashion category, which recorded a
noteworthy revenue of CHF 200M and a net income of CHF 25.0M. Additionally, the Jewelry segment achieved a revenue of
CHF 50M, showcasing its vital role in our overall portfolio.

Furthermore, our commitment to enhancing customer loyalty is reflected in our metrics, where the engagement rate reached
58%, bolstered by our initiatives around BrandLoyalty. The data from Q1 2024 indicates a revenue of CHF 150, while
projections for Q3 show a store count of 2024Q3 and revenue of CHF 140, emphasizing our strategic focus on refining
customer lifetime value, which stands at CHF 1.3M. Collectively, these metrics provide a roadmap for optimizing performance
across all categories.
